description:
## Context

Cross-repo half of presales-sqnce #115. The deterministic implementation (PR #116, merged) makes silently-dropped inventory inputs fail loud at the eval-adapter via a new `invalidPromptInputs` input-validity preflight. The complementary, generation-time guard belongs in this repo's `create-dataset` skill so violating cases are never frozen in the first place. The change was committed locally in the presales Codespace (branch `115-input-contract-audit`, `e4f6270`) but could not be pushed (token scoped to presales-sqnce); the exact patch + apply instructions were recorded as a comment on presales-sqnce PR #116.

## Desired behavior

Teach the create-dataset procedure to run the project's input-contract check before freezing and refuse to freeze a violating case (regenerate valid-by-construction, do not hand-trim). Document presales-sqnce's `eval-fixtures` drift guard as the concrete instance; projects with no input validators skip the audit.

## Acceptance criteria

- `skills/prompt-evals-create-dataset/SKILL.md` §5 gains an "Input-contract audit" sub-step between the `exit 1/2` hand-off line and the `cases.json` spot-check paragraph (verbatim from the PR #116 comment).
- `skill_lint.py` clean; offline test suites green.
- Plugin version bumped 0.6.0 -> 0.6.1 (docs change).

## Provenance

presales-sqnce #115 / PR #116 (merged 2026-06-23). Source patch: presales `115-input-contract-audit` @ e4f6270.
title: Generation-time input-contract audit step in create-dataset (presales #115)
